prompt: 5 audit findings with no explicit app description (Mode B)

assertions.text: Output contains the report header identifying Mode B (audit-findings) input mode
Output derives reasonable app context from the findings (identifies roles like editor, moderator, admin from the findings themselves)
Output contains between 5 and 10 abuse cases
Each abuse case has a BIL Score with Blast, Sensitivity, and Exploitability dimensions (each 1-3) and a criticality label
At least one abuse case identifies the F-1 + F-2 combination (user enumeration via admin endpoint + IDOR on documents) as a compound high-risk scenario
At least one abuse case connects F-5 (string-based role check) to a role confusion or escalation scenario
Output contains a Findings-to-Abuse Mapping table referencing all 5 findings (F-1 through F-5)
Output explicitly acknowledges limitations of working without a full app description
Output contains a Risk Summary with recommended remediation order
Abuse cases are ordered by BIL score descending (highest risk first)
